summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LinkedIn Growth Assistant app. Fixed critical Excel column access bug in backend. All API endpoints working correctly with AI integration, email sending, and Excel storage. Frontend form submission and validation working perfectly.
passed_tests: POST /api/submit with valid data - calls Gemini AI, saves to Excel, sends email, returns suggestions
POST /api/submit with missing fields - returns 400 error with proper validation
Frontend loads with split-screen layout (hero + form)
All 8 form fields present with correct data-testid attributes
Submit button exists with data-testid='submit-button' and is clickable
Form submission triggers API call and shows success page
AI suggestions preview displayed after successful submission
HTML5 form validation working for required fields
Success page shows growth plan confirmation and next steps
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all UI elements and flows working)
